details.IncidentDetail: "[2] 1125 BOTH DOT "

Log.Location: "Idaho Maryland Rd / Banner Lava Cap Rd"

details.IncidentDetail: "[30] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from 1125-Traffic Hazard to CLOSURE-Closure of a Road by CHP"
"[29] B42-011 CORDS 97 - SPOKE TO PGE // UNK ETA // CONDITIONS UNAFE TO WORK IN UNK WHEN THEY WILL GET TO IT"
"[28] 42-18 - RELIEVED BY CORDS ON 18 SIDE OF CLOSURE // ADVISE 42-11 ANOTHER CORDS EMPLOYEE ENRT NOW TO RELIEVE 11 // 11 CPZ"
"[26] [Notification] [CHP]-NCSO LL - 2 TKS ON WAY // 1 HAD EQUIPMENT FAILURE // HAD TO GET DIFFERENT TK - SHOULD BE 97 SHORTLY // BOTTOM HALF SHOULD BE CLOSED"
"[25] 1039 NCSO - STATED AT LINE 22 - CORDS WERE LOADING UP STUFF AND ENRT / WILL CB W/ ETA"
"[24] 42-11 VIA MDC MSG REQ ETA FROM CORDS"
"[22] NCSO ADV ETA 20-30 MIN"
"[21] 1039 NCSO - WILL CB WITH ETA ON CORDS "
"[20] 42-S3 VIA LL CORDS NEED TO COME OUT TONIGHT/AREA UNSAFE/ REQ ETA"
"[18] 1039 NCSO FOR CORDS - CPZ LINE LINE 15 / 17"
"[15] 42-18 - PGE REQ TO INFORM CORDS IDAHO MARYLAND X BANNER LAVA CAP HARD CLOSURE - MULT POLES COMPRAMIZED "
"[13] REPORTS FROM PASSING MOTORISTS OF MORE POWER LINES/TREES DOWN ON IDAHO MARYLAND BETWEEN BRUNSWICK AND BANNER LAVA CAP. WOULD PGE LIKE A HARD CLOSURE OF THE AREA TO ASSESS/WORK? THANK YOU"

"[12] 42-11 VIA MDC CAN YOU CHECK WITH PGE AND SEE IF POWER IS SHUT DOWN IN THE AREA? IM DIVERTING TRAFFIC AT ID MRYLND/BLC BUT TRAFFIC IS STILL COMING UP ID MRYLAND GOING UNDERNEATH THE TREE/POWER LINES"
"[10] 1039 PGE - STILL SHOWING PGE 97 / HAS MULT CALLS ITA IDAHO MARYLAND X LEE"
"[9] 42-11 VIA MDC - HAD TO GO GO BACK UP HILL TO HELP TURN TRAFFIC AROUND, CAME BACK AND PGE NO LONGER 97, DOES NOT LOOK LIKE ANYTHING HAS BEEN DONE TO ALLEVIATE ISSUE. CAN YOU GO LL PLEASE"
"[1] TREE DOWN 1125 ALL LANES // POWER LINE UNDER TREE // NEG SPARKING SEEN"
"[4] 300-K3 - ADV 45-D2 - CT REQ THEM TO RESPOND 20 X HARMONY RIDGE - PED 97 - POSS LOST IN SNOW "
"[6] [Notification] [CHP]-PGandE NEG ETA "
"[3] 1039 PGE - HAS STANDBY PERSON ON SCENE WAITING FOR TROUBLESHOOTER GO ARRIVE"
"[2] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from INFO-Information to CLOSURE-Closure of a Road by CHP"
"[1] ,,NEWTOWN CLOSED FRM NB AND SB END OF FORT JIM FOR POLE AND POWER LINES IN RDWY / PGE 97 THEY WILL ADV WHEN CLR"
"[21] [Notification] [CHP]-PGandE NEG ETA /ADV THEY DIDNT HAVE THE CALL FOR LINES DOWN WORKING ON GETTING DISPATCHED OUT /SENDING REPORT"
"[19] 1039 CORDS - WILL CLOSE RD AT HWY 50"
"[18] 1039 140 - A SAFE DISTANCE BTWN THE DOWN LINES"
"[17] CORDS INQ WHERE TO START AND STOP CLOSURE "
"[16] 1039 CORDS / NR LVM"
"[15] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from 1125-Traffic Hazard to CLOSURE-Closure of a Road by CHP"
"[14] 140 CHANGE TO CLOSURE "
"[13] 44-140 VIA LL - LEAVE OPEN / START CORDS FOR CLOSURE"
"[12] PGandE STIL NO ETA /// REQ IS OFCR IS 97 ADN NEG // PGandE ADV NEG RESOURCE AT THE MOMENT"
"[11] [Notification] [CHP]-PG and E WILL CB FOR ETA// UNABLE TO PROVIDE ETA ATM SINCE THERE IS A STAND DOWN DUE TO THE SNOW"
"[9] CO 1039 PGandE "
"[8] PGandE WILL CB W/ ETA"
"[3] POWER LINES 1125 IN RDWY "
"[12] [CHP] has closed their incident [260219TK0126]"
"[7] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from INFO-Information to SNOW Information by CHP"
"[3] PREPARE FOR PERIODS OF HIGH AVALANCHE DANGER IN THE GREATER LAKE TAHOE AREA FORECASTED SNOW AN DWIND MAY RESULT IN WIDE SPREAD AVALANCHE ACTIVITY IN THE MOUNTAINS "
"[38] 58-S2 FULL CLOSURE LIFTED - TKS ABLE TO PASS W/ FULL CHAINS @ COLFAX"
"[27] 45-R25 BEAT INFO EB LANES OPEN ALL TRFC EXCEPT COMM TKS "
"[7] [Appended, 10:44:38] [2] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from INFO-Information to CLOSURE-Closure of a Road by CHP"
"[6] [Appended, 10:44:38] [1] ,, 80 BEING CLOSED - ALL TRAFFIC TURNED AT APPLEGATE"
"[3] [Appended, 08:32:00] [1] THERE WILL BE A POSS CLOSURE FOR CHAIN CONTOL - ONE OF THE R UNITS WILL BE ENRT"
"[1] ^R2 - FULL CHAIN CONTROL EB 80 X APPLEGATE "
"[20] [Appended, 10:47:42] [11] *** CORR LN 10 45-S1 PAIRED UP W/45-R4"
"[17] [Appended, 10:47:42] [8] 45-C ADV PER 45-S3 / ENSURE SAC TMC IS ADVISED / FULL CHAIN CONTROL @ APPLEGATE - VEHS W/4WD AND SNOW TIRES AND CHAINS ONLY"
"[16] [Appended, 10:47:42] [7] 45-R12 EB 80 X APPLEGATE - FULL CHAIN CONTROL - ALL VEHS DIVERTED OFF AT APPLEGATE / 45-S3 CPZ"

"[10] [Notification] [CHP]-^50 TRFC RELEASED EB @ POINT VIEW AND SLY PARK // STILL HOLDING WB @ MEYERS"

"[7] [Notification] [CHP]-^50 EB TRF RELEASED AT TWIN BRIDGES // STILL HOLDING 50 EB @ PT.VIEW, SLY PARK AND SAND FLAT / STILL HOLDING 50 WB @ MEYERS // ETO FOR ALL OF US50 = 1700"
